data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring. While the linked use case mentions that 'AI proctoring flags if candidate looks away too long,' it does not provide concrete evidence of live proctor monitoring during the exam. This lack of explicit confirmation leads to a gap in satisfying the requirement, as the evidence does not fully cover both aspects of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming live proctor monitoring functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
